dialogos.texto_en: Alright!\nWe've had breakfast\nand it's time to start the day's activities!
You're energetic, Futaro-kun.
Heheh, that's because we're going to Shurijo Castle,\na famous tourist spot in Okinawa. I'm excited!
Yes, we can't miss Shurijo Castle.\nI'm looking forward to it.
After the castle, we'll go to Kokusai dori. \nWe have to decide on souvenirs for Dad today.
Huh? Didn't you go shopping for that yesterday?
Well, yes.\nBut, on the way, the mood kind of changed.
Huh? Why?
Oh, it's nothing.\nIt's our matter.
I wonder if Shurijo Castle is big since it's a castle?
I'm not sure.\nI've only seen pictures of the beautiful buildings.
Ah, and Shureimon?\nI've heard about it too.
What Ichika is referring to is probably the Seiden.\nIt's a building that's registered\nas a World Heritage Site.
Heh, Itsuki.\nYou're not doing enough research.
Huh?
The registered World Heritage Site\nis the Shurijo Castle ruins!\nThe buildings are a separate matter!
Oh, really?!
The buildings were reconstructed,\nso they're not part of the World Heritage Site.\nRemember that.
Oooh... I thought everything had been registered.
Well, it's an easy mistake to make.
So, when were the buildings reconstructed?
I think the current buildings haven't been around for\nmore than 30 years. By the way, they were reconstructed when \nthe ruins were registered as a World Heritage Site in 2000.
Hey, Nino, isn't Uesugi-san\nacting a little strange today?\nHe's like a walking encyclopedia or something.
Yeah, maybe.\nI wonder if he's back to his usual self.
Was it just a coincidence\nthat he was acting strangely yesterday?
I hope so.
Well, let's get going, then!
